00001| import { Alchemy, Network as AlchemyNetwork } from 'alchemy-sdk';
00002| import { config } from '../../config';
00003| 
00004| /**
00005|  * Alchemy SDK Configuration
00006|  * 
00007|  * Set up your Alchemy API key in env.json:
00008|  * VITE_ALCHEMY_API_KEY=your_api_key_here
00009|  * 
00010|  * You can get an API key from: https://dashboard.alchemy.com/
00011|  */
00012| 
00013| const alchemySettings = {
00014|   apiKey: config.alchemy.apiKey || 'demo',
00015| };
00016| 
00017| // Validate API key
00018| if (!alchemySettings.apiKey) {
00019|   console.warn(
00020|     'Alchemy API key not found. Please set VITE_ALCHEMY_API_KEY in your environment variables in env.json.'
00021|   );
00022| }
00023| 
00024| // Create and export default Alchemy instance (ETH mainnet)
00025| export const alchemy = new Alchemy({
00026|   ...alchemySettings
00027| });
00028| 
00029| // Export settings for reference
00030| export { alchemySettings };

00623| /**
00624|  * Convert chainId to Alchemy Network enum
00625|  * @param chainId - The chain ID to convert
00626|  * @returns Alchemy Network enum
00627|  * @throws Error if chainId is not supported
00628|  */
00629| export function getAlchemyNetwork(chainId: number): Network {
00630|   const network = CHAIN_ID_TO_NETWORK[chainId];
00631|   if (!network) {
00632|     throw new Error(`Unsupported chainId: ${chainId}. Supported chains: ${Object.keys(CHAIN_ID_TO_NETWORK).join(', ')}`);
00633|   }
00634|   return network;
00635| }
00636| 
00637| /**
00638|  * Get network details by Alchemy network
00639|  * @param network - The Alchemy network to get details for
00640|  * @returns Network details (name, native gas token symbol, native gas token name)
00641|  */
00642| export function getNetworkDetails(network: Network): NetworkDetails {
00643|   return NETWORK_DETAILS[network];
00644| }
00645| 
00646| /**
00647|  * Create a new Alchemy instance with custom settings
00648|  * @param apiKey - Your Alchemy API key
00649|  * @param network - The network to connect to
00650|  * @returns New Alchemy instance
00651|  */
00652| export function createAlchemyInstance(apiKey: string, network: Network): Alchemy {
00653|   if (network === Network.MATIC_MAINNET_OLD) {
00654|     network = Network.MATIC_MAINNET;
00655|   }
00656|   return new Alchemy({
00657|     apiKey,
00658|     network: network as unknown as AlchemyNetwork,
00659|   });
00660| }
00661| 
</file>
